notes: Player buffs/casts that remove debuffs, keyed by spellId. JUDGMENT/GAP layer only — `provides` (the removal categories cleared) comes from generated/spell-facts.json (DB2: dispel + dispel-mechanic + mechanic-immunity effects). List `provides` HERE only to add categories DB2 cannot see (it is UNIONED with the DB2 set).

DB2 cleanly captures every school dispel (Magic/Curse/Disease/Poison) and the Effect=39/Aura=77 mechanic clears (e.g. Blessing of Freedom). It does NOT encode a few mechanic removals (Tiger's Lust, Spirit Walk, Swift Art) — but those STILL fire SPELL_DISPEL at runtime (verified in logs), so curating their `provides` here is only needed for offline availability scoring; detection is log-driven.
scope: self | external (one ally) | party | raid | offensive (removed from an enemy). class/spec/scope are curated; name falls back to the DB2 name.
VALIDATE remover ids vs logs/DB2 for Midnight (12.0): some specs gained/lost dispels.

32375.name: Mass Dispel
32375.notes: AoE; also strips some otherwise-undispellable Magic and immunities.

374251.name: Cauterizing Flame
374251.notes: DB2 gives curse/disease/poison; bleed removal is added here (not encoded as a parseable effect).

19801.name: Tranquilizing Shot
19801.notes: Removes an Enrage and a Magic effect FROM the enemy.

116841.name: Tiger's Lust
116841.notes: Not encoded as a parseable DB2 effect, but fires SPELL_DISPEL in logs (verified removing Chains of Subjugation).

450627.name: Swift Art
450627.notes: Roll talented into Swift Art — snare removal every 30s. Fires SPELL_DISPEL in logs (verified removing Chains of Subjugation).

58875.name: Spirit Walk
58875.notes: Movement-impair removal not encoded as a parseable DB2 effect; expected to fire SPELL_DISPEL like Tiger's Lust.

20594.name: Stoneform
20594.notes: DB2 gives magic/curse/disease/poison; bleed removal added here.

768.name: Cat Form
768.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared Permeating Cold). Shapeshift breaks roots/snares; DB2 only encodes its Polymorph immunity.

781.name: Disengage
781.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared Chains of Subjugation). Movement-impair break, not DB2-encoded.

370665.name: Rescue
370665.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared Chains of Subjugation). Repositioning an ally breaks roots/snares; not DB2-encoded.

1266618.name: Burn It Out
1266618.notes: Discovered from logs (cleared Rotting Strikes). DB2 Effect=38 disease dispel → provides auto-derived; class/source unconfirmed.
